items.headline: Iowa man saves local boys from fiery train crash, calls it 'grace of God'
items.summary: Two Iowa boys are recovering after a fiery train crash and Alex Horak is credited with saving their lives.

items.headline: House Speaker Mike Johnson makes stop in Iowa for FAMiLY Leadership Summit
items.summary: The summit was the latest stop for some notable GOP candidates seeking election, and top of mind for them was reshaping culture.

items.headline: Iowa blood donation centers struggling due to national blood shortage
items.summary: The American Red Cross declared an emergency blood shortage on July 13. Donation centers say critically low supply can force hospitals to make tough decisions.

items.headline: Iowa DOT expects to reopen road below collapsed bridge by Wednesday night
items.summary: The railroad bridge over Iowa 415/NW 2nd Street was struck by a truck and collapsed on Friday.

items.headline: Lettuce recall sends some shoppers to local farmers markets
items.summary: A Cyclospora outbreak and lettuce recall have Quad Cities shoppers turning to local farmers for safe, locally grown greens.

items.headline: Quad-Cities school board preview: Budget and operation costs on this week's agendas
items.summary: United Township and Bettendorf both have school board meetings this week.

items.headline: Davenport motorcycle crash ends attempted Iowa State Patrol stop
items.summary: A motorcyclist was injured after fleeing an attempted Iowa State Patrol traffic stop late Saturday in Davenport before crashing into a parked vehicle.
